products.name: 10 Liters TC Licensed Agri Drone
products.description_plain: To adopt a new one-piece molding process to simplify the fuselage from dozens of original parts into a whole body. The body is made of high-strength, impact-resistant materials, which are strong and resistant fall. Fully waterproof body The body adopts an integrated waterproof design, supports washing, and the surface of the shell is painted with star blue, which is beautiful in appearance and eye-catching colors. New folding parts The new folding parts are made of one-piece injection molding, and the structure is more stable and durable. The unique C-shaped arm fixing clip design can effectively avoid problems such as swinging and sagging of the arm during handling. Classic tank: It adopts the classic 10-16L tank, which is the most widely used and most stable load solution on the market. Reinforced power plug The main power cord is routed out from the side, and the battery interface is fixed on the side of the tripod, avoiding the obstruction of the plug when replacing the battery, and the plugging and unplugging connectors are safer and more stable (optional AS150/AS150U plugs) Detachable camera mount A detachable camera adapter is designed on the front of the frame, which can be installed or closed according to needs Includes 1 Battery set - 22000mah 1 Battery charger 1 H12 remote 1 propeller set 1 Allen key set Specification: Pesticide Tank: 10 Litres Maximum Endurance: 19 minutes Max Range: 2 km Flying Radius: 0-1000 metres Flying Height: 0-40 metres Flying Speed: 0-10 metres/ second

rich.description_html:
To adopt a new one-piece molding process to simplify the fuselage from dozens of original parts into a whole body. The body is made of high-strength, impact-resistant materials, which are strong and resistant fall.

 

Fully waterproof body

The body adopts an integrated waterproof design, supports washing, and the surface of the shell is painted with star blue, which is beautiful in appearance and eye-catching colors.

 

New folding parts

The new folding parts are made of one-piece injection molding, and the structure is more stable and durable. The unique C-shaped arm fixing clip design can effectively avoid problems such as swinging and sagging of the arm during handling.

 

Classic tank:

It adopts the classic 10-16L tank, which is the most widely used and most stable load solution on the market.

 

Reinforced power plug

The main power cord is routed out from the side, and the battery interface is fixed on the side of the tripod, avoiding the obstruction of the plug when replacing the battery, and the plugging and unplugging connectors are safer and more stable (optional AS150/AS150U plugs)

 

Detachable camera mount

A detachable camera adapter is designed on the front of the frame, which can be installed or closed according to needs

 

Includes

1 Battery set - 22000mah

1 Battery charger

1 H12 remote

1 propeller set

1 Allen key set

info_sections.title: Description
info_sections.html:
Key Features:

 

  • 16-liter spray tank
  • 22000 mAh battery LiPo
  • Propeller 3090
  • X8 motor
  • Highly stable hexacopter design
  • Foldable design for esay transport to various locations 

 

Safety Features:

 

  • Collision avoidance radar
  • Terrain-following radar
  • Return-to-land on empty tank
  • Return-to-land on singal loss
info_sections.plain: Key Features: 16-liter spray tank 22000 mAh battery LiPo Propeller 3090 X8 motor Highly stable hexacopter design Foldable design for esay transport to various locations Safety Features: Collision avoidance radar Terrain-following radar Return-to-land on empty tank Return-to-land on singal loss

info_sections.title: Performance
info_sections.html:
• Capable of spraying up to 35 acres  daily
  • Can cover up to 2 acres per tank
  • Equipped with two GPS devices for accurate guidance
  • Four anti-drift nozzles for uniform spraying application

 

Proven Performance

 

Crop Testing:

 

Tested for over 18 months on various crops including tall crops like sugarcane, dense crops like wheat and millet, short crops like rice, vegetable crops like tomatoes and chilies, mountain crops like coffee and tea, etc.

 

Fertilizer Testing:

 

Tested with various pesticides, herbicides, fertilizers, and micro nutrients from major brands, as well as with compounds like panchagavya and IFFCO Nano Urea.

Precision Hardware with Compact Design : Built with a u-blox NEO-M9N receiver and powered by an ARM? The DroneCAN protocol enables real-time, noise-resistant communication with flight controllers like the Ag++. products.name: AeroFC V2 Flight Controller (Compatible with Open-Source Firmware & GCS)
products.description_plain: Features Dual-processor system with 32-bit architecture Supports obstacle avoidance radars and terrain-following altimeter 8 PWM motor outputs, 2 CAN buses, 3 UART ports Compatible with any open-source firmware and ground control software. AeroFC V2 is a next-generation, high-performance flight controller engineered to power any drone, any mission, anywhere. Designed and built in India, it brings together precision, reliability, and intelligent control to support everything from agriculture and mapping to logistics, surveillance, inspection, and custom UAV innovations. With full compatibility for any open-source firmware and ground control software. SUPERIOR PROCESSING POWER AeroFC V2 Flight Controller is powered by a high-performance main processor built on a 32-bit architecture, running at high speed. It operates alongside an efficient I/O processor to manage input and output seamlessly. ADVANCED EXTERNAL SENSOR SUPPORT AeroFC V2 Flight Controller supports CAN-based front and back obstacle avoidance radars, allowing your drone to navigate complex environments with ease. Additionally, the CAN-based altimeter provides precise terrain – following capabilities, ensuring stable and accurate flights even in rugged or varied landscapes. products.description_plain: Key features: Gets fix in seconds: The Reach RS2+ gets a fixed solution in seconds and maintains a robust performance even in challenging conditions. Centimeter accuracy can be achieved on distances over 60 km in RTK and 100 km in PPK mode. The receiver tracks GPS/QZSS (L1C/A, L2C), GLONASS (L1OF, L2OF), BeiDou (B1I, B2I), and Galileo (E1B/C, E5b). Built-in LTE modem: The Reach RS2+ features a power-efficient LTE modem ensuring 4G connectivity while staying backward compatible with 3G and 2G. Corrections can be accessed or broadcasted over NTRIP independently, without relying on an Internet connection on your phone. 22 hours on one charge: Up to 22 hours of autonomous work when logging data and up to 16 hours of work as an LTE rover, even in cold weather. The Reach RS2+ can charge from a USB wall charger or a power bank over Type-C. OPUS and PPP support: Antenna calibration details for the Reach RS2+ are added to NOAA’s National Geodetic Survey registry. The post-processing will be flawless with OPUS, AUSPOS, and PPP services. SIM LoRa radio RS-232 Water and dustproof: You can work in dusty areas or in the rain. Engineered to be tough : The Reach RS2+ is designed to work even in the most challenging environments. -20 °C to +65 °C Works during the coldest winters and hottest summers. Polycarbonate body: Covered with elastomer Real-time navigation: The Reach RS2+ can send precise coordinates over Bluetooth or Wi-Fi to your tablet with a lightbar navigation app. The RS-232 interface allows the direct connection of the Reach RS2+ to an autosteer system. Solution formats: NMEA, LLH/XYZ Base station mode: Use the Reach RS2+ to set up your own base station. Stream corrections over the network via NTRIP/TCP or LoRa radio, record base logs for post-processing. The Reach RS2+ works with any number of rovers, and it’s compatible with the Reach RS2 and Reach M2/M+. The Reach RS2+ is compatible with any receiver that supports RTCM3 and NTRIP. External radios are supported over RS-232

info_sections.title: Product Description
info_sections.html:
The XRotor X6 brushless power system is a power system capable of carrying a load of 3~5kg (per axis) for agricultural drones. It can provide a thrust of up to 11.9kg and match 28/30mm carbon fiber tube arms. It’s waterproof and dustproof to IPX7 standard and resistant to rainwater, pesticides, salt spray, sand, dust, mud, sandy soil, high temperature, and impact. Hobbywing XRotor X6 Plus also features the algorithm used for optimizing the FOC ESC & motor system and making the system more balanced, multiple protections like power-on self-detection, power-on abnormal voltage, over-current, and motor lock-up, and the real-time data output function.

Features:

  1. Simple and convenient: Simple assembly, easy to install and disassemble.
  2. Quality craftsmanship: The shell of this product adopts quality craftsmanship with exquisite workmanship, which is a perfect accessory for your RC toy.
  3. Strong stability: The motor adopts a new design with high endurance, stable connection, and strong stability.
  4. Very stable: The motor is extremely stable and will work with less impact.

story_chapters.body: The XRotor X6 brushless power system is a power system capable of carrying a load of 3~5kg (per axis) for agricultural drones. It can provide a thrust of up to 11.9kg and match 28/30mm carbon fiber tube arms. It’s waterproof and dustproof to IPX7 standard and resistant to rainwater, pesticides, salt spray, sand, dust, mud, sandy soil, high temperature, and impact. Hobbywing XRotor X6 Plus also features the algorithm used for optimizing the FOC ESC & motor system and making the system more balanced, multiple protections like power-on self-detection, power-on abnormal voltage, over-current, and motor lock-up, and the real-time data output function. Features: Simple and convenient: Simple assembly, easy to install and disassemble. Quality craftsmanship: The shell of this product adopts quality craftsmanship with exquisite workmanship, which is a perfect accessory for your RC toy. Strong stability: The motor adopts a new design with high endurance, stable connection, and strong stability. Very stable: The motor is extremely stable and will work with less impact.

As modern UAVs integrate more sophisticated and power-intensive equipment — including heated IMUs, optical flow sensors, OSDs, dual GPS modules, telemetry systems, companion computers, gimbals, cameras, landing gear, parachutes, digital servos, LED arrays, and Lidar systems — the demand for a reliable and robust power supply solution has become critical. Power-Cube 5.3V output cable (JST-GH female connector) with 3x JR servo connectors. 2. Power-Cube 12.0V output cable (JST-GH female connector) with 3x JR servo connectors. 3. Power-Cube 5.3V cable (JST-GH female connector to JST-GH female connector). 4. Power-Cube Backup cable

products.name: NamoAG
products.description_plain: Introducing NamoAG , an Indigenously developed AgriDrone Navigation device. Designed with the unique challenges of agriculture elds in mind, NamoAG delivers high-accuracy navigation, multi-constellation satellite support, and seamless pairing with Ag++ Flight Controller. From wide-open farms to complex terrains, y with condence. Key Features: Multi-Constellation Satellite Support: Simultaneous tracking of GPS, GLONASS, Galileo, BeiDou, SBAS, and QZSS for superior signal availability. High Navigation Accuracy: Enhanced positional accuracy with 1.5m – 3m CEP (Circular Error Probable), ideal for precision drone applications. Built-in SAW Filters and LNA (Low Noise Amplifier): Improves signal clarity and reduces interference for noise-resilient performance. Compact and Lightweight Design: Small form factor (61.82 x 61.82 x 19.81mm ~30g) for easy integration into lightweight UAV and drone frames High-Sensitivity Compass with ±8 Gauss Range: Enables precise heading detection and performance stability even in strong magnetic eld environments. DroneCAN Communication Protocol: Offers noise-resistant, interference-free, and real-time data transmission between GPS, compass, ight controllers, and other drone peripherals.

rich.description_html:
Introducing NamoAG , an Indigenously developed AgriDrone Navigation device. Designed with the unique challenges of agriculture elds in mind, NamoAG delivers high-accuracy navigation, multi-constellation satellite support, and seamless pairing with Ag++ Flight Controller. From wide-open farms to complex terrains, y with condence.

 

Key Features:

Multi-Constellation Satellite Support: Simultaneous tracking of GPS, GLONASS, Galileo, BeiDou, SBAS, and QZSS for superior signal availability.

 

High Navigation Accuracy: Enhanced positional accuracy with 1.5m – 3m CEP (Circular Error Probable), ideal for precision drone applications.

 

Built-in SAW Filters and LNA (Low Noise Amplifier): Improves signal clarity and reduces interference for noise-resilient performance.

 

Compact and Lightweight Design: Small form factor (61.82 x 61.82 x 19.81mm ~30g) for easy integration into lightweight UAV and drone frames

 

High-Sensitivity Compass with ±8 Gauss Range: Enables precise heading detection and performance stability even in strong magnetic eld environments.

 

DroneCAN Communication Protocol: Offers noise-resistant, interference-free, and real-time data transmission between GPS, compass, ight controllers, and other drone peripherals.

info_sections.title: Product Description
info_sections.html:
The Skydroid C10 stands out in the world of high-performance imaging with its advanced three-axis gimbal stabilization system. This device is engineered to ensure smooth and steady footage, even in the most challenging conditions. Whether you’re capturing breathtaking aerial views from a drone or shooting dynamic ground footage, the C10’s sophisticated gimbal technology minimizes vibrations and compensates for movement, delivering professional-quality video.

Features:

  1. Three-Axis Stabilization: The C10’s gimbal system stabilizes the camera across three axes—pitch, roll, and yaw—ensuring that your footage remains level and free of unwanted motion. This is crucial for maintaining clarity and professionalism in both action shots and static scenes.
  2. High-Resolution Imaging: Equipped with a high-resolution camera, the Skydroid C10 captures detailed and vibrant visuals. Its advanced optics and sensor technology are designed to handle varying light conditions, providing clear and sharp images.
  3. Versatile Mounting Options: The C10 is compatible with a wide range of drones and other mounting platforms. Its versatile design allows for easy integration with existing equipment, making it an ideal choice for both hobbyists and professionals.
  4. User-Friendly Controls: The intuitive control interface allows for easy adjustment of settings and gimbal modes. This ensures that users can quickly adapt to different shooting environments and achieve the desired effect.
  5. Durable Build: Constructed with high-quality materials, the C10 is built to withstand the rigors of outdoor use. Its rugged design ensures reliable performance even in challenging weather conditions.
  6. Enhanced Connectivity: The camera features advanced connectivity options, including wireless control and data transfer capabilities. This enables seamless integration with other devices and allows for real-time monitoring and adjustments.

products.name: SKYRC PC1080 Dual Channel Charger for Agriculture Drone Batteries
products.description_plain: Short Description The SKYRC PC1080 Dual Channel Charger is a professional-grade 6S LiPo battery charger tailored for industrial drones. With features like active PFC, sequential charging for 12 packs, and internal resistance metering, it delivers efficiency, safety, and reliability in every charge. Perfect for drone operators needing a robust and feature-rich charging solution.

rich.description_html:
Short Description

 

The SKYRC PC1080 Dual Channel Charger is a professional-grade 6S LiPo battery charger tailored for industrial drones. With features like active PFC, sequential charging for 12 packs, and internal resistance metering, it delivers efficiency, safety, and reliability in every charge. Perfect for drone operators needing a robust and feature-rich charging solution.

info_sections.title: Description
info_sections.html:
Key Features:

 

  • Dual-Channel Charging: Capable of balance charging two 6S battery packs simultaneously.
  • High Efficiency: Features Active Power Factor Correction (PFC) for up to 93% efficiency, reducing power grid interference.
  • Enhanced Safety: Includes short circuit, reverse polarity, and over-temperature protection.
  • Advanced Technology: Powered by a 32-bit high-speed CPU for superior processing capability.
  • Automatic Sequential Charging: Pairs with G630 hubs to charge up to 12 batteries sequentially based on their remaining capacity.
  • Durable Design: Equipped with a high-density fin-type aluminum heatsink and dual ball bearing cooling fans for stable long-term operation.
  • Battery Health Monitoring: Displays internal resistance of each battery cell for health diagnostics and pairing.
  • Environment Resistant: Conformal coating protects against moisture, dust, chemicals, and temperature extremes.

Package Includes:

 

  • 1 x SKYRC PC1080 6S Dual Channel LiPo Battery Charger
  • 1 x AC Power Cord
  • 1 x Synchronous Data Connector
  • 1 x English User Manual

info_sections.title: Product Description
info_sections.html:
The Skydroid H16 Remote Control, paired with the H16 Receiver, offers precise and reliable control for unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs). With a compact and ergonomic design, long transmission range, and anti-interference technology, it ensures smooth and stable flight performance in various environments. Featuring customizable control settings, multiple flight modes, and telemetry data feedback, it is the perfect choice for both professional and hobbyist drone pilots, providing an exceptional flying experience with ease and reliability.

 

Specifications:

 

Remote Controller

  1. Model No.: H16
  2. Working Voltage: 4.2V
  3. Frequency: 2.400 to 2.483GHz
  4. Endurance: 6-20 Hours
  5. Channels: 16
  6. RF Power: 20DB@CE/23DB@FCC
  7. Battery: 20000mA/H
  8. Charging Port: Type-C
  9. Weight: 1034g
  10. Size: 272 x 183 x 94mm

Receiver

  1. Model No.: R16
  2. Working Voltage: 7.2 to 72V
  3. Channels: 16
  4. RF Power: 20DB@CE/23DB@FCC
  5. Weight: 90g

info_sections.title: Product Description
info_sections.html:
This is a SKYDROID T10 2.4Ghz 10CH Remote Controller with T10 10-Channel Receiver. Dual antenna plus dual RF module with integrated control algorithms ensuring reliable communication via full angle high gain antennas the t10 uses the latest in FHSS (Frequency Hopping Spread Spectrum) technology to achieve perfect control and operation

Parameter adjustments via APP with upgraded traditional OSD to touch panel control (Connected via Bluetooth or USE, also supports S BUS PPM PWM Seria ports and external devices, etc Connects the app via Bluetooth, switching the operation model, adjusting the data of forward and reverse, rudder volume, channel binding, runaway protection value, SBUS, PPM output, and digital baud rate. Providing parameter saving and loading functions

Specially designed for UAV, Helicopter, Fixed Wing, Multi Rotor or Boat operation In video transmission, Data Link, and control of UAV Integrated with digital video transmission, farthest to.

 

Features:

  1. Dual Antenna plus dual RF module with integrated control algorithms ensuring reliable communication via full-angle high antenna.
  2. Integrated with digital video transmission farthest to 10 km.
  3. Integrated with data transmission, farthest to 20 KM.
  4. Parameter adjustment via APP with upgraded traditional OSD to touch panel control.
  5. Connected via Bluetooth or USB, also supports S.BUS, PPM, PWM serial ports, and external devices.
  6. Using 2 pieces of 18650 batteries (need buy separately), endurance over 20 hours based on 20 DBm transmit frequency.

info_sections.title: Product Description
info_sections.html:
The Skydroid H16 Pro is a state-of-the-art remote control system paired with a high-performance receiver, designed for advanced drone operators and professionals seeking precision and reliability in their flight control and telemetry. This comprehensive system is engineered to enhance the flying experience, offering superior control, real-time data transmission, and robust connectivity.

 

Features:

  1. Advanced Remote Control: The Skydroid H16 Pro features a sophisticated transmitter with an ergonomic design for comfortable handling during extended flight sessions. Its controls are intuitively laid out, providing easy access to essential functions and customizable settings.
  2. High-Resolution Touchscreen: The remote is equipped with a large, high-resolution touchscreen display that provides clear, real-time telemetry data, including GPS information, battery status, and flight parameters. This ensures that pilots have all the necessary information at their fingertips for precise control.
  3. Enhanced Connectivity: The H16 Pro integrates advanced connectivity options, including long-range communication capabilities and real-time video feed transmission. It supports multiple communication protocols and frequencies to ensure stable and interference-free control.
  4. Customizable Controls: The transmitter features programmable switches and knobs that can be customized to suit individual preferences and specific flight needs. This flexibility allows pilots to tailor the control interface to their unique requirements.
  5. Robust Receiver: The Skydroid Receiver included in the package is designed for optimal signal reception and reliability. It seamlessly pairs with the H16 Pro remote, ensuring a strong and stable connection between the operator and the drone.
  6. Built-in Telemetry: The system provides comprehensive telemetry data, including altitude, speed, and orientation. This real-time feedback is crucial for maintaining situational awareness and ensuring safe and accurate flight operations.
  7. Durable and Reliable: Constructed from high-quality materials, both the H16 Pro remote and receiver are built to withstand the rigors of outdoor use. Their rugged design ensures consistent performance even in challenging environments.
  8. Long Battery Life: The H16 Pro boasts a long-lasting battery that supports extended flight sessions without frequent recharging. The efficient power management system helps maximize operational time.
